M77 Assault Rifle
Assault Rifle·8 builds

Ballistic assault rifle.

Firepower24
Accuracy59.3
Handling38
Range46
Magazine24
Zoom1.2x
UNIQUE VARIANT
M77 Omnipositor“A deafening buzz. Then silence.”

A modified M77 Assault Rifle, with faster rate of fire and deeper magazine. Features a built-in flip scope for high precision.

This weapon uses unique upgrades; its mod slots are locked.

Combat Stats

DPS120Damage Per Second - bodyshot damage × rounds per minute ÷ 60
Dmg/Shot16Raw bodyshot damage per round before precision multiplier
RPM450Rounds Per Minute - how fast the weapon fires
Precision1.5xHeadshot damage multiplier - e.g. 1.5x means 50% bonus damage on precision hits

Weapon Inspect

Firepower24
Damage16Raw damage per round (bodyshot)
Precision1.5xHeadshot damage multiplier - e.g. 1.5x means 50% bonus damage on precision hits
Rate of Fire450 RPMRounds Per Minute
Accuracy59.3
Hipfire Spread2.15°Bullet spread angle when firing from the hip - lower is tighter
ADS Spread0.98°Bullet spread angle when aiming down sights - lower is tighter
Crouch Bonus80%Spread reduction bonus when crouching - higher means more accurate
Moving Inaccuracy32.7%Accuracy penalty while moving - lower is better
Handling38
Equip Speed0.94sTime to swap to this weapon
ADS Speed0.5sTime to aim down sights
Weight32%Weapon weight - affects movement speed while equipped
Recoil114%How much the weapon kicks when fired - lower is more stable
Aim Assist1.96°Aim magnetism cone - higher gives more bullet bending toward targets
Reload Speed2.6sTime to complete a full reload
Range46MEffective damage range in meters
Magazine24Number of rounds before needing to reload
Zoom1.2XScope magnification when aiming down sights
Mod Slots3Number of mod attachment slots available
Attachments

Time to Kill (Bodyshot)

1.07sWhite Shield - 140 HP/1.20sGreen Shield - 160 HP/1.47sBlue Shield - 180 HP/1.60sPurple Shield - 200 HP9 shots/10 shots/12 shots/13 shots

Time to Kill (Headshot)

0.67sWhite Shield - 140 HP/0.80sGreen Shield - 160 HP/0.93sBlue Shield - 180 HP/1.07sPurple Shield - 200 HP6 shots/7 shots/8 shots/9 shots

MarathonMeta is a community resource for strategy and builds. Not affiliated with Bungie. Marathon and all related assets are trademarks and property of Bungie, Inc. Game data sourced from alpha playtesting, dev insights, and community datamines.
